attributes.description: Single namespace deep dive with CPU/memory trends, pod resource usage, container restart tracking, memory composition, and network I/O.

allColumns.label: View logs in Discover for namespace:

query.esql:
FROM logs-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name), name = MAX(k8s.namespace.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, name, "N/A")
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS name = MAX(k8s.namespace.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name), created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = CASE(count == 1, DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created), "N/A")
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name), created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = CASE(count == 1, DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created), "N/A")
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.phase IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name), phase = MAX(k8s.namespace.phase)
| EVAL phase = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    phase == 1, "Active",
    "Terminated"
  )
| KEEP phase

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.phase IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name), phase = MAX(k8s.namespace.phase)
| EVAL phase = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    phase == 1, "Active",
    "Terminated"
  )
| KEEP phase

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name), name = MAX(k8s.namespace.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, name, CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " namespaces"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS name = MAX(k8s.namespace.name)

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    `CPU requests` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_request),
    `CPU limits` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`, `CPU requests`, `CPU limits`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    `CPU requests` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_request),
    `CPU limits` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`, `CPU requests`, `CPU limits`

embeddableConfig.description: CPU usage over time with request (dashed yellow) and limit (dashed red) reference lines.
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs requests & limits

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    `Memory requests` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_request),
    `Memory limits` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`, `Memory requests`, `Memory limits`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    `Memory requests` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_request),
    `Memory limits` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`, `Memory requests`, `Memory limits`

attributes.title: Memory working set vs requests & limits

embeddableConfig.description: Memory working set over time. Yellow dashed = requests, solid red = limits (OOMKill threshold).
embeddableConfig.title: Memory working set vs requests & limits

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit) BY k8s.container.name
| STATS total = SUM(cpu_limit)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit) BY k8s.container.name
| STATS total = SUM(cpu_limit)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

embeddableConfig.description: Total CPU limits across all containers in this namespace.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit) BY k8s.container.name
| STATS total = SUM(mem_limit)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total) / 1073741824.0, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit) BY k8s.container.name
| STATS total = SUM(mem_limit)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total) / 1073741824.0, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

embeddableConfig.description: Total memory limits across all containers in this namespace.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS vol_cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity) BY k8s.volume.name
| STATS total = SUM(vol_cap)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total) / 1073741824.0, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS vol_cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity) BY k8s.volume.name
| STATS total = SUM(vol_cap)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total) / 1073741824.0, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

embeddableConfig.description: Total volume capacity across all pods in this namespace.

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    RSS = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    `Working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    Available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, RSS, `Working set`, Available

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    RSS = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    `Working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    Available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, RSS, `Working set`, Available

embeddableConfig.description: Memory composition over time. RSS, working set, and available memory as separate series. SUM per 1m bucket.

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

embeddableConfig.description: Network I/O over time by direction (transmit/receive). SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io)) per 1m bucket.
CPU usage over time by pod. SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage) per 1m bucket, broken down by k8s.pod.name.
